title: Get SpO2 Summary by Interval
description:
This endpoint returns the SpO2 summary data for a specified date range. SpO2 applies specifically to a user’s “main sleep”, which is the longest single period of time asleep on a given date.

The measurement is provided at the end of a period of sleep. The data returned usually reflects a sleep period that began the day before. For example, if you request SpO2 levels for 2021-12-22, it may include measurements that were taken the previous night on 2021-12-21 when the user fell asleep.

The data returned includes average, minimum, and maximum SpO2 levels. It uses units that correspond to the Accept-Language header provided.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: start-date
parameters.description: The date in the format yyyy-MM-dd or today.

parameters.name: end-date
parameters.description: The date in the format yyyy-MM-dd or today. Maximum range: no limitation

response_fields.name: value : avg
response_fields.description: The mean of the 1 minute SpO2 levels calculated as a percentage value.

response_fields.name: value : min
response_fields.description: The minimum daily SpO2 level calculated as a percentage value.

response_fields.name: value : max
response_fields.description: The maximum daily SpO2 level calculated as a percentage value.
